articles.title: Trump Team Considers Steps to Ease Oil Price Spike
articles.expand: The Trump administration is considering a range of options to counter rising oil and gasoline prices amid the war in Iran, Interior Secretary Doug Burgum said Thursday, emphasizing that “everything is being considered,” from near-term interventions to longer-term strategies. President Trump met with Burgum and senior advisers before announcing plan...
articles.ai_headline: Equipo de Trump considera medidas para mitigar el aumento del precio del petróleo: intervenciones a corto plazo para estabilizar precios de combustible → USD alcista

articles.title: New Zealand Stocks Poised for Weekly Loss
articles.expand: New Zealand equities fell 98 points, or 0.7%, to 13,521 in Friday’s morning session, wiping out gains from the previous day. The decline tracked losses on Wall Street overnight and came as the conflict in the Middle East entered its seventh day, pushing oil prices higher and stoking inflation concerns, while adding to uncertainty over the timing an...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Medio Oriente en su séptimo día: precios del petróleo suben y aviva temores de inflación → USD alcista

articles.title: US Stocks Tumble Amid Geopolitical Uncertainty
articles.expand: US equities extended their losses on Thursday as the deepening conflict in Iran pushed crude oil prices above $80 per barrel, amplifying fears of a global economic slowdown and a resurgence in inflation. The Dow dropped 1.8%, while the S P 500 and Nasdaq fell 0.81% and 0.61%, respectively, as investors offloaded cyclically sensitive industrials and...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto en Irán empuja petróleo a $80 por barril: temores de desaceleración económica global y resurgimiento de la inflación → USD alcista

articles.title: La administración del presidente de EE.UU. Donald Trump busca controlar los precios del petróleo
articles.expand: El secretario del Interior de EE.UU., Doug Burgum, afirmó que la administración del presidente estadounidense Donald Trump está considerando una serie de opciones para abordar el aumento de los precios del petróleo y la gasolina en medio de la guerra en Irán, informó Bloomberg el viernes
articles.ai_headline: Administración Trump busca controlar precios del petróleo en medio de guerra en Irán: medidas para estabilizar mercado energético → USD alcista

articles.title: Scotiabank's base case is USMCA renewal — but the tail risks are worth pricing
articles.expand: The clock is ticking on the USMCA joint review and Scotiabank just released a comprehensive report that's worth a read. "The future of [USMCA] is the single most consequential macro uncertainty facing the Canadian economy this year," the report says. The good news first: Scotiabank's baseline is that USMCA gets ratified or extended with limited adj...
articles.ai_headline: Renovación del USMCA como caso base de Scotiabank: riesgos de cola significativos pero ratificación esperada con ajustes limitados → CAD alcista

articles.title: US admiral: Iran's ballistic missile attacks have decreased by 90%
articles.expand: CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper is highlighting something that markets should keep in mind: "If I just look back over the last 24 hours of the operation compared to the where we were to start, ballistic missile attacks have decreased by 90%... Drone attacks have decreased by 83%... we’re now up over 30 ships [destroyed]." He also highlighted ...
articles.ai_headline: Ataques con misiles balísticos de Irán disminuyen 90% en 24 horas: reducción de tensión geopolítica → NZD bajista

articles.title: European Stocks Close Sharply Lower
articles.expand: European stocks closed sharply lower on Thursday, mirroring the retreat in North American markets and extending a spell of heightened volatility as the war in the Middle East further weighed on the European economic outlook. The Eurozone’s STOXX 50 fell 1.7% to 5,771, while the pan-European STOXX 600 declined 1.4% to 604. Tensions between Iran and ...
articles.ai_headline: Retirada de mercados europeos con STOXX 50 cayendo 1.7% y STOXX 600 1.4%: tensión geopolítica en Medio Oriente aumenta aversión al riesgo → USD alcista

articles.title: USD/JPY Price Forecast: Bulls defend 157.00 as upside-pressure builds
articles.expand: USD/JPY advanced on Thursday during the North American session, up by nearly 0.30% as the Greenback is boosted by risk appetite deterioration, solid US jobs data and hawkish comments by the Richmond Fed President Thomas Barkin.
articles.ai_headline: USD/JPY sube 0.30% con datos laborales sólidos en EEUU y comentarios hawkish del presidente del Fed de Richmond: presión alcista en 157.00 → JPY bajista

articles.title: Trump says Iran is contacting them seeking guidance on negotiating a deal
articles.expand: Is this the start of the end? Trump also said that further action to reduce pressure on oil is imminent. Trump talked about a 4-5 week schedule but he hates: High oil prices Falling stock prices The market pricing out rate cuts (down to 36 bps from 60 bps before war) War in general In contrast to Trump, Hegseth is saying they have only just begun t...

articles.title: TSX Drops to 2-Week Low
articles.expand: Canada’s S P/TSX Composite Index fell about 1% on Thursday, slipping below 33,600 to a two-week low, as rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and signs of stubborn inflation weakened expectations for interest rate cuts. Stronger-than-anticipated wage growth and higher manufacturing costs pushed government bond yields higher in line with U...
articles.ai_headline: TSX cae 1% a mínimos de dos semanas por tensiones geopolíticas y signos de inflación persistente: expectativas de recortes de tasas se debilitan → CAD bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD Analysis – March 5th. Will the Euro Make the First Move?
articles.expand: The wave pattern on the 4-hour chart for the EUR/USD pair has taken on a somewhat less desirable form, but it still raises no questions. There is still no talk of canceling the upward trend segment that began in January of last year; only the internal wave structure is occasionally being adjusted. In my view, the pair has completed the formation of...
articles.ai_headline: Patrón de onda en gráfico de 4 horas del par EUR/USD mantiene tendencia alcista iniciada en enero del año pasado: ajuste interno de la estructura de onda → EUR alcista

articles.title: GBP/USD. Smart Money. Traders Await Nonfarm Payrolls
articles.expand: The GBP/USD pair continues to decline within a bullish trend. The only active pattern remains bearish imbalance 16, but the bulls missed it by just 6–7 points last week and failed to touch it and form a signal. This could have produced a good profit if you trade against the trend. Personally, I try to follow signals that align with the trend rather...
articles.ai_headline: Patrón de desequilibrio bajista 16 en GBP/USD: los traders esperan los datos de empleo no agrícola en EEUU para definir la tendencia a corto plazo → GBP bajista

articles.title: EUR/USD. Smart Money. The War in Iran Will Not End Soon
articles.expand: The EUR/USD pair declined during the first two days of the week and has now been moving sideways for two days. We have already seen the market's initial reaction to the events in the Middle East. The bullish picture for EUR/USD has not been completely broken, but it has suffered serious disruptions. The news background proved stronger than the tech...
articles.ai_headline: Guerra en Medio Oriente sin fin a la vista: reacción inicial del mercado ya se ha producido y ha interrumpido la tendencia alcista → EUR bajista

articles.title: NZDUSD finding support against a familiar channel trend line
articles.expand: The NZDUSD fell sharply yesterday, breaking below a lower channel trendline that had defined the pair's trading range since early February. That break triggered a momentum move toward a key support target at 0.5834, though the path there was anything but clean — price action was choppy, with notable two-way volatility along the way. The inability t...

articles.expand: The major European indices tried to continue the rebound to the upside early in the session, but stalled and reversed the sharply to the downside. German Dax was up 161.44 points at session highs. It is closing down -431.29 points or -1.78%. France's CAC was up 47.28 points at session highs, is closing down -121.93 points or -1.49%. UKs FTSE 100 wa...

articles.title: Pound Sterling Price News and Forecast: GBP/USD slumps as strong US jobs data lifts US Dollar
articles.expand: The Pound Sterling (GBP) resumes its downtrend for the week on Thursday, courtesy of heightened tensions in the Middle East and solid US employment data ahead of Friday's Nonfarm Payrolls report. At the time of writing, GBP/USD trades at 1.3337, down 0.25%. Read More...

articles.expand: El analista jefe de Nordea, Jan von Gerich, espera que el BCE mantenga su postura por ahora mientras monitorea de cerca cómo el conflicto en Oriente Medio afecta el crecimiento y la inflación en la zona euro

articles.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: The 0.7150 caps the upside for now
articles.expand: Sticky domestic inflation and a Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) that isn't about to temper its hawkish attitude continue to offer an underlying cushion for the Australian Dollar (AUD), allowing for additional gains while limiting the downside.
articles.ai_headline: Inflación interna estable y RBA con actitud hawkish: nivel de 0.7150 limita el alza por ahora → AUD alcista

articles.title: BoC: Crecimiento, energía y riesgos de recorte – TD Securities
articles.expand: Los analistas de TD Securities ven al Banco de Canadá equilibrando la incertidumbre comercial, los precios más altos del petróleo y la demanda interna. Dicen que el PIB debe crecer por encima del potencial para evitar riesgos de desinflación y recortes de tasas, y que los datos del primer trimestre serán fundamentales

articles.title: BoC: Growth, energy and cut risks – TD Securities
articles.expand: TD Securities analysts see the Bank of Canada balancing trade uncertainty, higher Oil prices and domestic demand. They say GDP must run above potential to avoid disinflationary risks and rate cuts, and that Q1 data will be pivotal.
articles.ai_headline: Análisis de TD Securities sobre el BoC: crecimiento, energía y riesgos de recortes: PIB debe superar potencial para evitar riesgos desinflacionarios y recortes de tasas → CAD alcista

articles.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: US Dollar resumes its advance on war, employment
articles.expand: The US Dollar (USD) trades with a firmer tone on Thursday, as the escalation of the Middle East war pushes investors into safety. The EUR/USD pair hovers around 1.1590, down on the day, albeit still holding within weekly limits, as the USD gains are moderated.

articles.title: A friendly reminder that we do have the US non-farm payrolls tomorrow
articles.expand: The consensus is for a softer reading in the headline non-farm payrolls figure, following the strong showing in January. articles.title: Swiss CPI rises 0.6% mom in February, annual inflation holds at 0.1%
articles.expand: Switzerland’s consumer prices rose more than expected in February, offering a modest sign of price pressure despite still subdued annual inflation. Data from the Federal Statistical Office showed CPI increased 0.6% mom, slightly above the expected 0.5% gain. Core CPI, which excludes fresh and seasonal products as well as energy and fuel, rose by 0....

articles.title: BOJ governor Ueda says wage increases much needed to get inflation to price target
articles.expand: Wages need to increase significantly for Japan to sustainably, stably achieve BOJ price target Mechanism in which wages, prices rise in tandem needs to become embedded in the economy What is most important in raising real wages is to increase labour productivity It is hard to directly influence real wages with monetary policy It is difficult to set...
